zh.Trim, County Meath, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯特利姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Simon de Joinville於1260年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯特利姆時，他的父親Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville34歲，母親Maud de Lacy37歲。他和Joan FitzLeon至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1309年4月24日在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯爾姆林享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Simon de Joinville于1260年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯特利姆时，他的父亲Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville34岁，母亲Maud de Lacy37岁。他和Joan FitzLeon至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1309年4月24日在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯爾姆林享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Simon de Joinville was born in 1260, in Trim, County Meath, Ireland, his father, Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville, was 34 and his mother, Maud de Lacy, was 37. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Joan FitzLeon. He died on 24 April 1309, in Culmullin, County Meath, Ireland, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Simon de Joinville est né en 1260, à Trim, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Maud de Lacy, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Joan FitzLeon. Il est décédé le 24 avril 1309, à Culmullin, County Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.Ludlow Castle,Shropshire,England: Ludlow Castle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Simon de Joinville 1260 in Trim, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville 34 und seine Mutter Maud de Lacy 37. Er hatte mit Joan FitzLeon mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. April 1309 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Culmullin, County Meath, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Simon de Joinville è nato il nel 1260 nel Trim, County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Lacy, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Joan FitzLeon. Morì il 24 aprile 1309, nel Culmullin, County Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.Trim, County Meath, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ メアストリム
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Simon de Joinvilleが1260年にアイルランドコウントイ メアストリムで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Genevilleは34歳，母Maud de Lacyは37歳であった。彼はJoan FitzLeonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1309年4月24日にアイルランドコウントイ メアスクウルムリンで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Simon de Joinville(이)가 1260년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 트림에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Lacy(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Joan FitzLeon(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1309년 4월 24일 아일랜드 카운티 미스 컬멀린에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Simon de Joinville nasceu em 1260, em Trim, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Lacy, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Joan FitzLeon. Ele faleceu em 24 de abril de 1309, em Culmullin, County Meath, Irlanda, com 49 anos.

ro.Ludlow Castle,Shropshire,England: Ludlow Castle, Shropshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Simon de Joinville родился в 1260 г. в местности трим, коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Lacy, 37. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Joan FitzLeon. Он умер 24 апреля 1309 г. в местности кулмуллинь, коунти мит, Ирландия в возрасте 49 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Joan FitzLeon. Murió el 24 de abril de 1309, en Culmullin, County Meath, Irlanda, a la edad de 49 años.
